name: Nova SN68 Miner
description: Supervise the Nova SN68 mining agent loop.  Provides start/stop/status/directive/telemetry tools and relays urgent OUTBOX items via Telegram.

novaDir.description: Path to the Nova workspace directory (contains STATUS.md, OUTBOX.md, etc.)

sshHost.description: SSH host for the GPU pod (default: swift-shark-ff)

liumPod.description: Lium pod ID if using lium SSH

commandTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for shell commands in milliseconds
